title: Runtime Patching
summary: Bind JSON data into DOM elements with colon-prefixed attributes and Silcrow.patch().
content: Silcrow runtime patching updates DOM text, properties, visibility, classes, and attributes from JSON data. Bindings are declared with colon-prefixed attributes like :text, :value, :show, and :disabled. The patch root can be a CSS selector or DOM element, limiting updates to a specific subtree.

sections.title: Bind JSON Data
sections.summary: Bind JSON data into a scoped DOM subtree.
sections.content: Declare colon-prefixed attributes in HTML, then call Silcrow.patch() with matching JSON data and a root selector.

html.title: Bind user fields
html.description: A heading, email input, status block, and button update from the user object.

html.title: Bind user fields
html.description: A heading, email input, status block, and button update from the user object.

use_cases: Render server-returned JSON without writing component glue code.
Update one widget by passing a CSS selector root to Silcrow.patch().
Toggle form state and visibility from backend-controlled data.
